error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘data’ [item 0]
title: Merge node missing binary field
symptom: When attempting to merge two binaries using a merge node, an error occurs stating 'The item has no binary field ‘data’ [item 0]'. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
not_this_if: Only one binary is being merged
root_cause: The error occurs because the merge node is not configured to output a single object containing both binaries. Instead, it is likely outputting separate objects, which leads to the absence of the expected binary field in the merged output.
fix_steps: Ensure that the merge node is set to combine the binaries into a single output object.
Use the expression '{{ Object.keys($binary).join(',') }}' to dynamically retrieve binary keys if their names are unknown.
agent_instruction: Configure the merge node to output a single object with both binaries included.
